topicOverview: An in-depth deep dive into Model Evaluation. Mastering this is critical for passing technical interviews for Data Scientist roles.
whyItMatters: Model Evaluation is a core foundation of modern engineering. Interviewers use it as a proxy to test your deeper understanding of systems, performance, and best practices.
